daily.today_energy: Your mercury vibes are giving communicator energy. Today's all about speaking your truth and letting people actually hear you. The universe is listening, so make it count.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the real you beneath the surface. Whether it's deepening an existing connection or attracting fresh energy, authenticity is literally your superpower right now.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today. Don't sleep on that creative thought bouncing around—bring it to the table. The momentum is there; trust your instincts to guide the narrative.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. Whether it's a walk, stretching, or just changing your scenery, honor that restless energy. You'll feel lighter after.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing backflips in your communication zone, Gemini. This week feels like your brain's finally syncing with your heart. Expect clarity on something that's been fuzzy, plus random opportunities showing up in your DMs. Trust the cosmic breadcrumbs.
weekly.love: Your vibe is magnetic rn. Whether you're single or coupled, authenticity is your love language this week. Stop overthinking the small stuff and let conversations flow naturally. Someone's definitely noticing your energy shift.
weekly.career: Ideas are flowing faster than your WiFi. This is the week to pitch that project you've been sitting on or make that connection you've been hesitant about. Your intuition about people and timing is spot-on. Ride that wave.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's asking for a reset. Prioritize sleep and intentional downtime—your body knows what it needs. Light movement like walking or stretching feels especially grounding. Listen to those subtle signals your energy's sending.
